_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTDL_v2
name: Evrima Survival (Primal Hosted)
author: ice@primalheaven.com
description: The Isle EVRIMA survival dedicated server (Steam app 412680, 'evrima' branch). Generates Game.ini from panel variables on every boot, fetches game + modded-binary updates from Primal infrastructure only, and preserves customer Engine.ini lines outside the Primal managed block.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Evrima Survival - The Isle Dedicated Server app 412680, 'evrima' beta branch
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

# Evrima = 'evrima' beta branch of app 412680 (the default 'public' branch is Legacy).
SRCDS_APPID=${SRCDS_APPID:-412680}
STEAM_BRANCH=${STEAM_BRANCH:-evrima}
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} -beta ${STEAM_BRANCH} validate +quit

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true

mkdir -p /mnt/server/TheIsle/Saved/Config/LinuxServer
echo "Evrima survival install complete"

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: The Isle Dedicated Server app id (412680). Do not change.

variables.name: Steam Branch
variables.description: SteamCMD branch. 'evrima' = Evrima build. Do NOT change (the 'public' branch is Legacy).

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Run SteamCMD update on each server start (1=yes, 0=no)

variables.name: Steam User
variables.description: Steam username for SteamCMD (anonymous for dedicated server)

variables.name: Primal API Base URL
variables.description: Primal backend used for the update gate and modded-binary distribution.

variables.name: Primal API Key
variables.description: API key for the Primal backend (platform-managed).

variables.name: Primal Server ID
variables.description: Unique server id in the Primal update manager (platform-managed).

variables.name: Panel Name
variables.description: Which panel this server belongs to (platform-managed).

variables.name: Update Gate
variables.description: Ask the backend for permission to start (blocks while mod lags a vanilla update). 1=on, 0=off.

variables.name: Modded Binary
variables.description: Fetch the Primal modded server binary (1=on, 0=vanilla).

variables.name: Mod Required
variables.description: If 1, the server refuses to start without a verified modded binary.

variables.name: Manage Game.ini
variables.description: Regenerate Game.ini from these panel variables on every boot (1=on). Set 0 only for manual-config debugging.

variables.name: EOS Client Id
variables.description: Epic Online Services dedicated-server client id (platform-managed).

variables.name: EOS Client Secret
variables.description: Epic Online Services dedicated-server client secret (platform-managed).

variables.name: Stats API Base
variables.description: If set, writes the GSV stats-dumper endpoints (pstats/astats/nstats/gstats) into the Primal managed block of Engine.ini (platform-managed).

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Display name shown in the server browser

variables.name: Map
variables.description: Evrima map to load

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum concurrent players (MaxPlayerCount)

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Join password. Leave empty for a public server (also controls bServerPassword).

variables.name: Admin Steam IDs
variables.description: Steam64 IDs with in-game admin (AdminsSteamIDs). One per line or comma-separated.

variables.name: VIP Steam IDs
variables.description: Steam64 IDs with VIP slots (VIPs). One per line or comma-separated.

variables.name: Whitelist Enabled
variables.description: Only whitelisted Steam IDs may join (bServerWhitelist)

variables.name: Whitelist Steam IDs
variables.description: Steam64 IDs allowed when the whitelist is enabled (WhitelistIDs)

variables.name: Allowed Classes
variables.description: Playable dinosaur classes (AllowedClasses), one per line or comma-separated. Empty = all classes allowed.

variables.name: Discord Invite URL
variables.description: Full Discord invite URL shown in-game (e.g. https://discord.gg/yourserver)

variables.name: Global Chat
variables.description: Enable global chat (bEnableGlobalChat)

variables.name: Queue Enabled
variables.description: Enable the join queue (bQueueEnabled)

variables.name: Queue Port
variables.description: Queue system port. Leave empty to use game port + 1 (allocate it in the panel).

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Steam query port. Leave empty to use the primary server port.

variables.name: RCON Enabled
variables.description: Enable RCON (bRconEnabled). Requires an RCON password.

variables.name: RCON Port
variables.description: RCON port. Leave empty to use game port + 2 (allocate it in the panel).

variables.name: RCON Password
variables.description: RCON password (required when RCON is enabled)

variables.name: Day Length (minutes)
variables.description: In-game day length (ServerDayLengthMinutes)

variables.name: Night Length (minutes)
variables.description: In-game night length (ServerNightLengthMinutes)

variables.name: Dynamic Weather
variables.description: Enable dynamic weather (bServerDynamicWeather)

variables.name: Growth Multiplier
variables.description: Growth speed multiplier (GrowthMultiplier)

variables.name: Corpse Decay Multiplier
variables.description: Corpse decay rate multiplier (CorpseDecayMultiplier)

variables.name: Spawn AI
variables.description: Enable AI spawning (bSpawnAI)

variables.name: AI Density
variables.description: AI population density (AIDensity)

variables.name: AI Spawn Interval
variables.description: Seconds between AI spawn checks (AISpawnInterval)

variables.name: Spawn Plants
variables.description: Enable plant spawning (bSpawnPlants)

variables.name: Plant Spawn Multiplier
variables.description: Plant spawn rate multiplier (PlantSpawnMultiplier)

variables.name: Migration
variables.description: Enable species migration (bEnableMigration)

variables.name: Mutations
variables.description: Enable genetic mutations (bEnableMutations)

variables.name: Humans
variables.description: Enable the human class (bEnableHumans)

variables.name: Replay Recording
variables.description: Allow replay recording (bAllowRecordingReplay)
